# ADR-NNNN: Decision title

- Status: Proposed
- Date: YYYY-MM-DD
- Deciders: Names or roles

## Context

Describe the problem, constraints, and forces affecting the decision.

## Decision

State the chosen approach.

## Alternatives considered

List credible alternatives and why they were not selected.

## Consequences

Describe positive, negative, operational, security, privacy, and cost effects.

## Validation

Explain how the decision will be tested or reviewed.

## Supersedes

Link any superseded ADRs.
